feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Modelling the Diachronic Emergence of Phoneme Frequency Distributions
entry.content:
Authors: FMP Martín, S Salhan -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.09503, 2026

Abstract: Phoneme frequency distributions exhibit robust statistical regularities across languages, including exponential-tailed rank-frequency patterns and a negative relationship between phonemic inventory size and the relative entropy of the ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Spin Induced Geometry: Emergence of Metric and Torsional Sectors from Spinor Source
entry.content:
Authors: E Varani -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.08769, 2026

Abstract: We present a geometric framework in which both metric and torsional degrees of freedom emerge dynamically from spinor currents, without being postulated as fundamental properties of the affine connection. The fundamental dynamical ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Metrology of Complexity and Implications for the Study of the Emergence of Life
entry.content:
Authors: S Imari Walker -arXive-prints, 2026

Abstract: One of the longest standing open problems in science is how life arises from non-living matter. If it is possible to measure this transition in the lab, then it might be possible to understand the physical mechanisms by which the emergence of life occurs ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Temporal Berry Phase and the Emergence of Bose-Glass-Analog Phase in a Clean U (1) Superfluid
entry.content:
Authors: R Shindou, P Zhao, X Fang -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.09422, 2026

Abstract: ... origin for the emergence of the glassy phase in phase-fluctuation-driven superfluid transitions. ... arXivLabs is a framework that allows collaborators to develop and share new arXiv features ... arXiv is committed to these values and ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life
